name: aca-native-mcp-skills
description: Agent skills for Automated Client Acquisition: define ICPs, build audiences, launch outreach, manage deliverability, create content, and optimize campaigns through one ACA MCP connection.

interface.shortDescription: Run the full client-acquisition loop through one ACA MCP connection.
interface.longDescription: A publishable bundle of ACA skills for Automated Client Acquisition: define offers and ICPs, build and score audiences, launch personalized outreach, monitor deliverability, create content support, score replies, and run weekly optimization. Requires a configured ACA MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Run ACA kickoff for my workspace.
Find and launch an ACA campaign.
Give me an ACA pipeline status brief.
